---
title: "Development and Validation of the Jumbo Squid Catch Database for Stock Assessment"
subtitle: "Proposed database for discussion and agreement"
author: "Ricardo Oliveros Ramos"
date: last-modified
nocite: |
  @*
link-citations: true
papersize: a4
toc: false
toc-depth: 2
highlight-style: monochrome
number-sections: true
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
  docx:
    reference-doc: ../_includes/quarto_latex_article_reference.docx
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    pdf-engine: lualatex
    geometry:
      - margin=2.5cm
    colorlinks: false
    tbl-cap-location: top
    fig-cap-location: bottom
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        \usepackage{booktabs}
        \usepackage{longtable}
        \usepackage{array}
        \usepackage{etoolbox}
        \AtBeginEnvironment{longtable}{\small}
        \setlength{\emergencystretch}{3em}
---


```{=html}
<div style="font-style: italic; margin-top: 0.5rem;">Third Squid Workshop (SCW18)</div>
<div style="margin-top: 0.35rem; margin-bottom: 0.35rem;"><a href="SCW18-squid3_data.pdf">PDF version</a> | <a href="SCW18-squid3_data.docx">MS Word version</a></div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="paper-title">Development and Validation of the Jumbo Squid Catch Database for Stock Assessment</div>
```

# Summary {.unnumbered}

<!-- Briefly state the purpose, principal findings, and proposed monthly catch database for 1997–2025. -->

# Scope and Intended Database

## Assessment Period

<!-- Describe the 1997–2025 assessment period and its rationale. -->

## Database Structure

<!-- Describe the temporal, fleet, area, catch, source, treatment, and provenance fields. -->

## Terminology and Attribution Rules

<!-- Define the essential terminology and summarise the agreed attribution assumptions. -->

# Data Sources and Source Hierarchy

## Member Submissions

<!-- Summarise the files received from Members and their temporal resolution and coverage. -->

## FAO Area 87 Reference Data

<!-- Describe the FAO Area 87 annual series used for validation and reconstruction. -->

## Additional National and Secondary Sources

<!-- List the official national, public, and published sources retained for the analysis. -->

## Source-Precedence Rules

<!-- Present the agreed source hierarchy and note only material exceptions. -->

## Member Communications and Confirmations

<!-- Summarise confirmations that affect interpretation of missing values, zeros, areas, or fleet attribution. -->

# Validation Approach

## Annual Comparison with FAO Area 87

<!-- Describe the aggregation and comparison of monthly series with annual FAO catches. -->

## Diagnostic Criteria

<!-- Describe the focus on relative differences above 5%, while retaining important absolute discrepancies. -->

## Diagnostic Outputs

<!-- List the tables, figures, and CSV diagnostics produced. -->

# Validation and Proposed Treatment by Member

## Chile

### Data Coverage

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### FAO Consistency

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Proposed Treatment

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Peru

### Artisanal Component

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Industrial Component

<!-- Address the historical Korea, Japan, and USSR catches attributed to Peru industrial, including the brief Japan 2012 exception and avoidance of double counting. -->

### Proposed Peru Series

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Ecuador

### Data Coverage and Limitations

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Reconstruction Sources and Approach

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Proposed Ecuador Series

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## China

### Data Coverage

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### FAO Consistency

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Proposed Treatment

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Korea

### Historical Context and Data Coverage

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### FAO Consistency

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Proposed Treatment

<!-- Include reconstruction of 2012–2014 and explicit confirmed-zero years. -->

## Chinese Taipei

### Data Coverage

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### FAO Consistency

<!-- Placeholder. -->

### Proposed Treatment

<!-- Include the confirmed interpretation of missing rows as zero catch. -->

# Reconstruction and Temporal Imputation

## General Approach

<!-- Briefly describe how annual totals and monthly seasonal patterns are combined when reconstruction is required. -->

## Member-Specific Applications

<!-- Summarise the reconstructed or imputed periods by Member. -->

# Proposed Final Database

## Coverage

<!-- Summarise final coverage by Member, fleet, area, period, and data status. -->

## Summary of Modifications

<!-- Insert the central modification table. -->

## Database Fields

<!-- List and define the final database fields. -->

## Provenance and Versioning

<!-- Describe source identifiers, status flags, versioning, and the modification log. -->

# Additional Spatial and Operational Data

## National Data Sources

<!-- Summarise available port, spatial, fleet, or operational information from Peru, Chile, and Ecuador. -->

## SPRFMO Open Data

<!-- Summarise the potential use and reconciliation of spatial catch-and-effort data. -->

# Future Work and Recommendations

## Chile

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Peru

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Ecuador

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## China

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Korea

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Chinese Taipei

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Group-Wide Recommendations

<!-- Placeholder. -->

# Annexes

## Annex A. Data-Source Catalogue

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Annex B. Availability Matrix

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Annex C. FAO Diagnostic Table

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Annex D. Modification Log

<!-- Placeholder. -->

## Annex E. Communications Log

<!-- Placeholder. -->
